core_payload.content:
# DeepMine: The Future Cognitive Quarry

## 1. Role
DeepMine will become the broader quarry fabric of N1Hub, extracting high-value intellectual ore from providers, the open internet, and user corpora through more deliberate routing, stronger manifests, and clearer downstream handoff discipline.

## 2. Future Quarry Contract
The quarry will widen beyond the current implementation with better provider diversity, more explicit ore manifests, retrieval budgets, cache intelligence, and branch-aware extraction boundaries. Quarry output will carry enough structure that A2C, Workspace, and swarm lanes can consume it without folklore.

## 3. Operational Consequence
The rest of the ecosystem will be able to reason more deeply because the raw material entering refinement will be cleaner, cheaper, and better packaged. Quarry quality will remain a first-order limit on higher-order intelligence.

## 4. Philosophical Alignment
DeepMine supports To Dig Deep by treating extraction quality and extraction economics as foundational rather than incidental.

neuro_concentrate.summary: DeepMine defines the future quarry fabric of N1Hub: broader provider routing, stronger ore-manifest discipline, richer cache and retrieval intelligence, better branch-aware handoff bundles, and more deliberate conversion of external intelligence into reusable raw material.

epistemic_ledger.rationale: Stripped meta-commentary leakage. Dream now asserts future state directly.
